# Instructions for GitHub Copilot and similar assistants working on Gratonite

- Start with [`docs/HANDOFF.md`](docs/HANDOFF.md), then [`AGENTS.md`](AGENTS.md).
- Follow verification expectations in `docs/HANDOFF.md`: run available scripts from root `package.json` and align with `.github/workflows/release-gates.yml` before claiming work is complete.
- Cursor-specific rules under `.cursor/rules/` describe the same discipline for editors that load them; apply the same standards here.
